events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to assess structural bolting with DTI squirter washers not fully crushed. The reference is RCSC Specification. DTI (Direct Tension Indicator) washers are used to indicate proper bolt tension. They have protrusions that crush when the bolt is tightened to the required tension. If they are not fully crushed, it indicates insufficient tension. According to RCSC, DTI washers must be fully crushed to ensure proper preload. So this is non-compliant. The work is rough-complete, so it's installed but not yet accepted. The condition is installed-defective and non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: high or critical? In structural bolting, insufficient tension can lead to joint failure, so critical. Percent complete: maybe 90%? But we need a number. Since it's rough-complete, maybe 80-90%. I'll put 85. Value: not applicable. Confidence: high, 0.95. Findings: "DTI squirter washers not fully crushed, indicating insufficient bolt tension." Actions: "Re-tension bolts to achieve full crush of DTI washers per RCSC requirements." Rationale: "RCSC requires DTI washers to be fully crushed to verify proper bolt preload; incomplete crushing indicates non-compliance." References: RCSC Specification sections on DTI washers. I'll output JSON.
